use_codes.desc: METHOD FOR TRANSDERMAL ADMINISTRATION OF A DRUG THROUGH NON-SCROTAL SKIN USING A TRANSDERMAL DRUG DELIVERY DEVICE CONTAINING THE DRUG AND HAVING AN ADHESIVE SURFACE
